messages.content: You extract structured telecom ticket fields as fenced JSON.
Ticket: user 13800138000 cannot use apn cmnet.
I will identify the phone number and APN from the ticket.
Extract JSON with the APN and fault number.
Classify telecom tickets using the configured taxonomy.
Earlier example: a local subscriber has weak indoor signal.
That example belongs to coverage quality analysis.
Ticket: roaming user cannot access mobile internet. Classify the ticket.
